query:
SELECT 
  dcc.contract_no,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_discount,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_amount,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.principal AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS principal,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.interest AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS interest,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.fee AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS fee,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS penalty,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS unlock_fee,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS overpaid,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS bad_debt,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM debt_collected_cache dcc
WHERE dcc.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND CAST(dcc.discount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0
GROUP BY dcc.contract_no
ORDER BY total_discount DESC
LIMIT 5;

  SUM(CAST(dcc.bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS bad_debt,
